source_old_req:
The top-level system component Microwave_Control must define an internal state variable ctime to represent the remaining cooking time in seconds. The system must guarantee the following safety interlock constraints:  
1. When the heating element is on, the door closed sensor must be true.  
2. When the heating element is on, the value of ctime must decrease.  
3. When ctime reaches zero, the heating element must be off.
natural_requirement: The Microwave_Control component shall define the implementation-level data routing and execution constraints for Microwave_Control.Impl. In the implementation layer, Microwave_Control.Impl shall route signal flow from clear to MC.clear through clear_TO_MC_clear and signal flow from clear to DC.clear through clear_TO_DC_clear. Additionally, Microwave_Control.Impl shall use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_MC_clear, use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_DC_clear, use immediate communication timing on connection start_TO_MC_start, and use immediate communication timing on connection kp_0_TO_DC_kp_0.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from clear to MC.clear through connection clear_TO_MC_clear.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall declare connection clear_TO_MC_clear from clear to MC.clear.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from clear to DC.clear through connection clear_TO_DC_clear.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall declare connection clear_TO_DC_clear from clear to DC.clear.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_MC_clear.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection clear_TO_MC_clear as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_DC_clear.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection clear_TO_DC_clear as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection start_TO_MC_start.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection start_TO_MC_start as immediate.

requirement_items.text: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection kp_0_TO_DC_kp_0.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection kp_0_TO_DC_kp_0 as immediate.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall declare connection clear_TO_MC_clear from clear to MC.clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall declare connection clear_TO_DC_clear from clear to DC.clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection clear_TO_MC_clear as immediate. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection clear_TO_DC_clear as immediate. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection start_TO_MC_start as immediate. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall assign Communication_Properties::Timing on connection kp_0_TO_DC_kp_0 as immediate.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from clear to MC.clear through connection clear_TO_MC_clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall route the signal flow from clear to DC.clear through connection clear_TO_DC_clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_MC_clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection clear_TO_DC_clear. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection start_TO_MC_start. The Microwave_Control.Impl implementation shall use immediate communication timing on connection kp_0_TO_DC_kp_0.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
